title: clusia pallida
intro: Clusia pallida, also known as the White Clusia or Clusia tree, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Clusiaceae family, native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clusia pallida include treating digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, as well as offering protection against certain types of cancer and cardiovascular disease. Clusia pallida is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal formulations to harness its medicinal properties.
